final:
module sd_card_interface (
    input [7:0] cmd,
    input valid,
    output reg [7:0] resp
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (valid) begin
            case (cmd)
                8'h01: resp = 8'hFF; // Command 1
                8'h02: resp = 8'hAA; // Command 2
                8'h03: resp = 8'h55; // Command 3
                default: resp = 8'h00; // Default response
            endcase
        end else begin
            resp = 8'h00; // No valid command
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (cmd == 8'h01) begin
        resp <= 8'h00;
      end else if (cmd == 8'h02) begin
        resp <= 8'hFF;
      end else if (cmd == 8'h03) begin
        resp <= 8'hAA;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
